description: Style Note The right shoe to beat the corporate mid-week blues from bata. There is a reason the brand is a household name and this shoe shows us why. Easy on the pocket and easy on the eye, we love this chocolate coloured pair! Find a pair of your size and buy them now, before we run out of stock... Product Details Leather upper with stitch details at the seams of the toe box Padded inner and tongue Classic four hole lace ups Upper adhered to the outsole TPU outsole with a raised heel that has grooves all over Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in sunlight
